title: Chest pain triage
text: New chest pain with shortness of breath, fainting, or radiation to arm or jaw should be treated as urgent and evaluated immediately.

title: Fever guidance
text: Persistent fever over 3 days, severe dehydration, confusion, or breathing difficulty warrants urgent in-person evaluation.

title: Headache red flags
text: Sudden worst headache, neurologic deficits, stiff neck, trauma, or altered mental status are red flags requiring urgent care.
